heading: Connection String Error with DB Tools
body:
You might see the following error when using the [SRV Connection Format](manual/reference/connection-string-formats) format
(`mongodb+srv://`) to connect to Atlas from one of the
[MongoDB Database Tools](database-tools) (`mongodump`, `mongorestore`,
etc):

```none
lookup nta8e.mongodb.net on 123.45.67.8:27017: cannot unmarshal DNS message
```

If so, use one of the following connection options instead:

- Use the `--uri` option with a
  [non-SRV connection string](manual/reference/connection-string-formats) (`mongodb://`).

- Use the `--host` option to specify the host to connect to.

codeBlocks.content: lookup nta8e.mongodb.net on 123.45.67.8:27017: cannot unmarshal DNS message
